name: Anupam Shobhakar
description: '''Anupam Shobhakar''' is an Indian musician, composer, instrumentalist, record producer, and classically trained [[sarod]]ist currently living in [[Brooklyn]], New York. He has released three world fusion albums, and one classical Indian music album. He has performed live around the world at various venues and for charitable causes.  Shobhakar's track "Water" made it to the first round of the [[Grammy Awards]].
